meaning: n.闆跺敭鍟嗕汉,浼犳挱鐨勪汉
examples: A stronger relationship between the retailer/producer and the consumer isn't just about financial incentives.
The Future Group, India's largest retailer, has introduced "organized chaos" into its shops to make consumers feel at home.
Even when a retailer gets a customer to walk in the store, she can easily see if there's a better deal online or at another store nearby.
Morgan Stanley chief investment strategist Byron Wien rode retailer Target to a 23% increase.
Also Wednesday, ladies clothing retailer Chico FAS more than doubled its first quarter earnings versus last year.
